name: Pumpkin Mousse Pie (Wvhv17a)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, combine the evaporated skim milk and cornstarch.
2. Microwave uncovered on full power until very hot but not boiling, about 1 minute.
3. Combine the egg whites, pumpkin puree, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, zest, and orange juice in a processor.
4. Whiz until smooth.
5. With the motor running, slowly pour in the milk mixture.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pie crust.
7. Chill until set, at least 2 hours.
8. Serve with crunchy oat sprinkles.
Per serving: 164 calories, 6 gm protein, 29 gm carbohydrates, 4 gm fat, .5 gm saturated fat, 1 mg cholesterol, 80 mg sodium.
